{
  "claims": [
    "Federal legislation is proposed to prohibit state and local governments from enforcing any AI laws for a period of ten years.",
    "Senator Josh Becker has expressed concern over efforts to preempt California's emerging AI regulations.",
    "California’s AI Transparency Act is described as the first of its kind in the nation.",
    "The Physicians Make Decisions Act ensures that doctors have the final say in medical decisions, not AI.",
    "The California AI Work Group in Education aims to incorporate best practices in K-12 education.",

    "California is positioned as a national and global leader in technology regulation.",

    "SB 361 requires businesses deploying high-risk AI systems that process personal information to create strong standards for information protection."
